title: Yijing Hexagram 5: Xu (Waiting)
description: Hexagram 5 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 5 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Waiting. If you are sincere, you have light and success. Perseverance brings good fortune. It furthers one to cross the great water.
